PropertyMetaData Properties

One Identity Manager API Server

The PropertyMetaData type exposes the following members.

Properties
  NameDescription
BitMaskCaptions
Returns display names for the bits in a bit mask.
ColumnName
Returns the name of the property.
CountDigits
DateFormat
Description
DescriptionMl
Returns a descriptive text for this property.
Display
DisplayBuilder
DisplayMl
Returns a display name for this property.
FkDisplayPattern
FkRelation
Format
IsDynamicFk
Returns a value indicating whether values can be interpreted as dynamic foreign keys in the DbObjectKey format.
IsMAllKeyMember
IsMultiLine
IsMultiValued
IsPrimaryKeyMember
IsRange
Returns a value indicating whether values are to be interpreted as a value range according to ValueRange.
IsReadOnly
IsValidColumnForFiltering
Returns a flag indicating whether the property supports filtering.
IsValidColumnForGrouping
Returns a flag indicating whether the property supports grouping.
IsValidColumnForSorting
Returns a flag indicating whether the property supports sorting.
LikeDbColumn
Gets or sets the name of a related database column.
LikeDbTable
Gets or sets the name of a related database table.
LimitedValues
MaxLen
MinLen
MultiLanguageType
SyntaxType
TableName
Returns the TableName of the property.
Type
Returns the data type.
ValidReferencedTables
Returns a list of referenceable tables by a dynamic foreign key.
